top_articles.title: Critical flaw in wolfSSL library enables forged certificate use
top_articles.summary: A critical vulnerability in the wolfSSL SSL/TLS library can weaken security via improper verification of the hash algorithm or its size when checking Elliptic Curve Digital Signature Algorithm (ECDSA)

top_articles.title: Adobe Patches Reader Zero-Day Exploited for Months
top_articles.summary: The vulnerability is tracked as CVE-2026-34621 and Adobe has confirmed that it can be exploited for arbitrary code execution.
